title: clerodendrum preslii
intro: Clerodendrum preslii, also known as the "Turk's Turban," is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Clerodendrum preslii include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
